subject: [RFC PATCH 2/2] virtio-balloon: add stats push mode

2026-05-13.patch_summary: This patch adds a new feature to the virtio-balloon driver called stats push mode. When enabled, the guest pushes statistics to the host at regular intervals instead of the default pull model. This provides two benefits: it allows the host to detect if the guest is unresponsive and it ensures that latency-sensitive consumers receive fresh statistics at a guaranteed cadence without needing to poll. The patch introduces a new configuration field stats_push_interval_ms, which specifies the interval in milliseconds between pushes. If this field is set to 0, the default pull model is used. The patch also includes changes to the driver to support the new feature and ensure that it works correctly with existing code.
